display.purpose: The single page <h1> only. Never reused for smaller headings.

body.purpose: Subtitle copy, lightbox metadata, general prose.

label.purpose: Eyebrow, platform tags, pill filters, perf-panel category headers.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Default state for tiles and panels per the Always-Lit Rule. Always present, never purely flat.

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: Hover/focus state for gallery tiles, paired with translateY(-3px) and a 4% media zoom.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: The lightbox surface, always rendered as clearly elevated above the page.

motion.name: tile-hover
motion.purpose: Gallery tile lift and shadow deepen on hover/focus.

motion.name: media-zoom
motion.purpose: 4% scale zoom on tile media on hover, paired with the tile lift.

motion.name: control-transition
motion.value: border-color 200-220ms ease, color 200ms ease, background 200ms ease
motion.purpose: Pills, inputs, and buttons on hover/focus.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Single primary action per panel, e.g. "Run speed test".
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; color: #1a1310; background: #c98a4b; border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 9px 18px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.88; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c98a4b; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Filter Pill
components.description: Platform filter pill, inactive and active states.
components.css: .ds-pill { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; color: #9b958c; background: transparent; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 999px; padding: 7px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease, background 200ms ease; } .ds-pill:hover { color: #ece8e3; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .ds-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c98a4b; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-pill-active { color: #1a1310; background: #c98a4b; border-color: #c98a4b; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Search field with an inset Hugeicons search glyph.
components.css: .ds-search-wrap { position: relative; max-width: 360px; } .ds-search-icon { position: absolute; left: 14px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 16px; height: 16px; color: #9b958c; } .ds-search-input { width: 100%; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; color: #ece8e3; background: #141210; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 999px; padding: 11px 16px 11px 38px; outline: none; transition: border-color 220ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease; } .ds-search-input:focus { border-color: #c98a4b; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(201,138,75,0.18); }

components.name: Gallery Tile
components.description: Signature bento gallery cell: full-bleed media with a bottom gradient-scrim caption.
components.css: .ds-tile { position: relative; display: block; padding: 0; border: none; background: #141210; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 24px -18px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); transition: transform 260ms ease, box-shadow 260ms ease; } .ds-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 18px 36px -18px rgba(0,0,0,0.6); } .ds-tile:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c98a4b; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-tile-media { position: absolute; inset: 0; } .ds-tile-media img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 400ms ease; } .ds-tile:hover .ds-tile-media img { transform: scale(1.04); } .ds-tile-meta { position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding: 24px 12px 10px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.65), transparent); } .ds-tile-id { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #fff; } .ds-tile-platform { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.72); }

narrative.overview: This system documents a curated archive, not a dashboard. Every render Nestor's delivery network has produced lives behind a warm, low-lit interface: an off-black canvas, one amber accent used sparingly, and an editorial display face (Fraunces) reserved for the single page title. The bento gallery is the centerpiece; everything else (search, filters, the speed test panel) is deliberately quiet so the renders stay the loudest thing on screen. This explicitly rejects the generic SaaS dashboard look: no blue/purple gradient admin chrome, no identical equal-sized card grids, no cream/beige "safe" body background, no gradient text, no uppercase tracked eyebrows scattered above every section.
keyCharacteristics: Off-black/off-white dual surface, never pure #000 or pure #fff.
One accent (Warm Amber) carries all emphasis; no secondary or tertiary color roles.
Fraunces serif is reserved exclusively for the display headline; everything else is Outfit.
Full-bleed media tiles with bottom gradient-scrim captions, not caption bars below thumbnails.
Persistent, layered elevation: raised surfaces always carry a resting shadow, not just on hover.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Warm Amber is the only saturated color anywhere in the interface. If a second color is ever needed, desaturate it into the neutral ramp before reaching for a new hue.

rules.name: The Dual Surface Rule
rules.body: Dark and light are both fully specified token sets, swapped via [data-theme='light'], not a dark theme with light values bolted on as an afterthought.

rules.name: The One Serif Rule
rules.body: Fraunces appears in exactly one place: the page <h1>. Every other text element uses Outfit.

rules.name: The Always-Lit Rule
rules.body: Nothing on this surface is perfectly flat. Tiles, panels, and modals carry a resting shadow before any interaction occurs; hover/focus deepen it, they don't introduce it from nothing.

dos: Do keep Warm Amber to a single accent role; every other color stays in the neutral ramp.
Do give every tile, panel, and modal a resting shadow per the Always-Lit Rule, even with no interaction.
Do reserve Fraunces for the one page <h1>; everything else is Outfit.
Do render media full-bleed in gallery tiles with a gradient-scrim caption, never a separate caption bar.
Do use Hugeicons SVG icons for every icon need; never emoji or raw unicode glyphs.
donts: Don't introduce a second saturated accent color; desaturate into the neutral ramp instead.
Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard look: no blue/purple gradient admin chrome.
Don't use identical equal-sized card grids; the bento span rhythm is the deliberate alternative.
Don't default to a cream/beige body background.
Don't scatter uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.
Don't use border-left/border-right colored stripes as an accent technique anywhere.
